value.found_quote: Codex(Cloud) Agent Cloud doing autonomously PR
value.rationale: The page is a forum topic listing. It references a cloud-based Codex agent acting autonomously ("Codex(Cloud) Agent Cloud doing autonomously PR") and related cloud topics like "Self-Hosted Cloud Codex instances" and "codex-cloud" tags, which align with the notion of delegating tasks to the cloud to run asynchronously. However, the page does not explicitly describe a named "Cloud task delegation" feature where Codex delegates tasks to the cloud; it only contains user thread titles touching on cloud/autonomous behavior. The substantiation is indirect, hence low confidence.
